title: Source Code Inspection Workflow for AC Verification

integration_analysis.name: Integration with XML AC Parsing (STORY-270)
integration_analysis.description: Source Code Inspection Workflow receives parsed AC data from XML AC Parsing Protocol

details: AcceptanceCriterion model (STORY-270) outputs: id, given, when, then, source_files, test_file, coverage_threshold
Source Code Inspection Workflow (STORY-271) consumes: ac.source_files for file loading (line 198)
Source Code Inspection Workflow (STORY-271) consumes: ac.given, ac.when, ac.then for keyword extraction (line 206)
SourceInspectionResult references ac_id which maps to AcceptanceCriterion.id

file_references.content: AcceptanceCriterion Data Model with all required fields
SourceInspectionResult Data Model consuming AC data

sequence: Step 1: XML AC Parsing (lines 67-79) detects <acceptance_criteria> blocks
Step 3: Source files hints extraction (lines 100-115) adds verification metadata
Step 5: Source Code Inspection consumes model (lines 195-220)

integration_analysis.name: Integration with Verification Workflow
integration_analysis.description: Source Code Inspection Workflow is properly integrated into overall verification workflow

steps: Step 1: Read Story File (line 385) - loads story for parsing
Step 2: Parse Acceptance Criteria (lines 396-400) - uses XML AC Parsing Protocol
Step 3: Discover Source Files (lines 403-412) - uses Source Code Inspection discovery
Step 4: Verify Each AC (lines 415-439) - uses Source Code Inspection patterns

details: SourceInspectionResult feeds into verification report JSON structure
FileEvidence provides file_path, lines, code_snippet for evidence field

integration_analysis.name: Tool Integration (Read, Grep, Glob)
integration_analysis.description: Only allowed tools (Read, Grep, Glob) are used - no forbidden tools (Write, Edit, Bash)

Read.purpose: Source file loading and content inspection

Grep.purpose: Pattern search for AC keywords and implementation

Glob.purpose: File discovery when hints not provided

enforcement.content: Tool Restrictions (READ-ONLY) section explicitly forbids Write, Edit, Bash

flow_diagram: 1. Story file parsed by XML AC Parsing Protocol
2. Each AC passed to Source Code Inspection Workflow

BR-001.rule: All evidence must reference specific file locations
BR-001.evidence: FileEvidence requires file_path (line 272), enforcement at line 277

BR-002.rule: Discovery fallback when no hints provided

BR-003.evidence: Tool restrictions enforce Read, Grep, Glob only (lines 509-523)

FileEvidence_aggregation.details: Multiple FileEvidence objects aggregate into SourceInspectionResult.files_inspected array

conclusion: STORY-271 Source Code Inspection Workflow is properly integrated with STORY-270 XML AC Parsing Protocol. Data models are compatible, tool usage is compliant with read-only restrictions, and the verification workflow correctly chains parsing -> inspection -> reporting.
